006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
021
022/**
023 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link Json5Serializer}.
024 *
025 * <p>
026 * Extends {@link JsonSerializerSession} to support JSON5 serialization with unquoted attribute names
027 * (when safe to do so) and single-quoted strings.
028 *
029 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
030 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
031 * </ul>
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonBasics">JSON Basics</a>
035 * </ul>
036 */
037@SuppressWarnings({
038   "resource", // Pipe writer is wrapped by JsonWriter; caller/pipe owns lifecycle (same as JsonSerializerSession)
039   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for Json5 serializer session hierarchy (matches JsonSerializerSession)
040})
041public class Json5SerializerSession extends JsonSerializerSession {
042
043   /**
044    * Builder class.
045    */
046   @SuppressWarnings({
047      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for Builder extends JsonSerializerSession.Builder hierarchy
048   })
049   public static class Builder extends JsonSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
050
051      /**
052       * Constructor
053       *
054       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
055       */
056      protected Builder(Json5Serializer ctx) {
057         super(ctx);
058      }
059
060      @Override
061      public Json5SerializerSession build() {
062         return new Json5SerializerSession(this);
063      }
064   }
065
066   /**
067    * Creates a new builder for this object.
068    *
069    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
070    * @return A new builder.
071    */
072   public static Builder create(Json5Serializer ctx) {
073      return new Builder(ctx);
074   }
075
076   /**
077    * Constructor.
078    *
079    * @param builder The builder for this object.
080    */
081   protected Json5SerializerSession(Builder builder) {
082      super(builder);
083   }
084
085   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSerializerSession */
086   protected boolean isSimpleAttrs() { return true; }
087
088   @Override
089   protected JsonWriter getJsonWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
090      var output = out.getRawOutput();
091      if (output instanceof JsonWriter output2)
092         return output2;
093      var w = JsonWriter.create(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isEscapeSolidus(), getQuoteChar(), true, isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
094      out.setWriter(w);
095      return w;
096   }
097}
